title: MilitaryNNTroopPrediction reviewer handoff
description: Stable contract for reviewer-handoff.json files generated from diagnostic bundles. The schema is intentionally documentation-focused and dependency-free so downstream automation can validate expected fields without parsing Markdown.

generated_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp for when the handoff was generated.

artifact_dir.description: Directory that was inspected to build the handoff.

release_status.description: Raw release-health status if available, otherwise unknown.

review_status.description: Reviewer-facing routing status derived from release status and missing artifacts.

recommended_rerun.description: Narrow local command to rerun when validation is incomplete.

copyable_summary.description: One-paragraph human handoff suitable for PR, issue, or chat review.

missing_expected.description: Expected outputs missing according to artifact-manifest.json.

missing_key_artifacts.description: Reviewer-critical artifacts missing from the generated bundle.

key_artifacts.description: Reviewer-critical artifacts, presence, size, hashes, and purpose.

review_order.description: Machine-readable checklist matching the release bundle index review sequence.

release_health_preview.description: Short Markdown/text preview of release-health.md when present.

triage_preview.description: Short Markdown/text preview of triage-summary.md when present.
